issue_title: custom:mini-media-player does not use original entity icon
issue_body_preview:
I have the latest updates of HA and as well of the custom card. Many thanks for this custom card, I really like it!!!

The only problem that I observed is that the original entity icon is not used but it looks something like always using ```icon-park:cast-screen```
test_description_zh: 在 Home Assistant 仪表盘中配置 mini-media-player 自定义卡片，绑定一个已设置自定义图标的媒体播放器实体（例如设置了 mdi:speaker 图标的实体），观察卡片上显示的图标是否与实体原始配置的图标一致。
expected_result_zh: mini-media-player 卡片应显示实体本身配置的原始图标（如 mdi:speaker），而不是默认显示为 cast-screen 类的通用图标。
